messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0029",
  "title": "在商业模式、玩法创新、体验纯粹性上的取舍与代价",
  "page_index": 31,
  "page_range": "31"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0030",
    "title": "商业模式的“克制与激进”",
    "page_range": "31",
    "summary": "This section can answer questions about its core topic: the conceptual contrast or balance between \"restraint\" and \"radicalism\" in business models. It cannot answer questions regarding specific entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types, as the provided text consists solely of the section title and contains no substantive content."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0031",
    "title": "游戏玩法的“危险融合”",
    "page_range": "31",
    "summary": "This section introduces the topic of \"dangerous fusion\" (危险融合) in gameplay. Based solely on the provided text, it can answer questions regarding the naming or thematic categorization of this specific gameplay concept. The excerpt consists only of a section heading and contains no definitions, entities, dates, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types. For retrieval purposes, this node functions as a topical marker or heading; substantive answers will require content from surrounding sections."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0032",
    "title": "体验至上的“大胆放弃”",
    "page_range": "31-32",
    "summary": "This section contains only a heading and copyright notice. It can answer:\n- **Topics:** The thematic focus is on prioritizing user experience through strategic abandonment or simplification, as indicated by the title “体验至上的‘大胆放弃’”.\n- **Entities & Dates:** The copyright entity is DianDian, with a copyright year of 2026.\n- **Location:** The section spans pages 31–32.\n- **Definitions, Procedures, Claims, Tables, Figures, Metrics, Evidence:** None are present. The provided text lacks substantive content, so it cannot answer questions regarding operational steps, analytical claims, data metrics, visual aids, or supporting evidence."
  }
]

message.content: This parent section (pages 31–32) establishes a high-level framework for analyzing strategic trade-offs and associated costs across three core dimensions: business models, gameplay innovation, and user experience purity. It is structured around three subtopics: the conceptual balance of "restraint" versus "radicalism" in business models, the thematic categorization of "dangerous fusion" in gameplay design, and an experience-first strategy characterized by "bold abandonment." The provided excerpts contain only section headings and a copyright notice (Entity: DianDian; Date: 2026). No definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types are visible. For retrieval purposes, this node functions strictly as a structural and topical marker; substantive answers regarding specific strategies, operational steps, analytical claims, or supporting data will require content from the full document sections.
